title: Student Affairs Department - About Us
content:
Student Affairs Department - About Us

Istanbul Esenyurt University senior management in accordance with the objectives and principles determined by YÖK; In line with the vision and mission of the university, it is responsible for carrying out, planning, directing, coordinating and supervising all activities necessary to carry out education and training in accordance with the principles of effectiveness and efficiency.

This content was updated on 01/09/2024.
